title: Formalize Codex parent/child orchestration contracts
description: The current repo now distinguishes cadence runtime from Codex orchestration. The next gap is to formalize the Human-started parent Codex model, child role result contract, and parent join contract before any scheduler-to-parent automation bridge is attempted.
triage_notes: Role-result and join contracts are now formalized as release-grade docs and schemas. Remaining work is candidate freeze, CI evidence, and sign-off for v1.11 readiness.
